creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
From the poudriere session, this shows bacula-fd was linked to openssl from ports.

root@132amd64-dvl:~ # ldd /usr/local/sbin/bacula-fd 
/usr/local/sbin/bacula-fd:
	libintl.so.8 => /usr/local/lib/libintl.so.8 (0x297e7f907000)
	libz.so.6 => /lib/libz.so.6 (0x297e80e03000)
	libbacfind-13.0.1.so => /usr/local/lib/libbacfind-13.0.1.so (0x297e8002e000)
	libbaccfg-13.0.1.so => /usr/local/lib/libbaccfg-13.0.1.so (0x297e81f89000)
	libbac-13.0.1.so => /usr/local/lib/libbac-13.0.1.so (0x297e812ef000)
	libm.so.5 => /lib/libm.so.5 (0x297e82bd7000)
	libthr.so.3 => /lib/libthr.so.3 (0x297e839c4000)
	libwrap.so.6 => /usr/lib/libwrap.so.6 (0x297e84f77000)
	libssl.so.12 => /usr/local/lib/libssl.so.12 (0x297e83f94000)
	libcrypto.so.12 => /usr/local/lib/libcrypto.so.12 (0x297e868c3000)
	liblzo2.so.2 => /usr/local/lib/liblzo2.so.2 (0x297e85b02000)
	libc++.so.1 => /usr/lib/libc++.so.1 (0x297e877b9000)
	libcxxrt.so.1 => /lib/libcxxrt.so.1 (0x297e884a2000)
	libc.so.7 => /lib/libc.so.7 (0x297e885be000)
	libgcc_s.so.1 => /lib/libgcc_s.so.1 (0x297e89673000)
	[vdso] (0x7ffffffff5d0)
root@132amd64-dvl:~ # pkg which  /usr/local/lib/libssl.so.12
/usr/local/lib/libssl.so.12 was installed by package openssl-3.0.11,1
root@132amd64-dvl:~ # logout
